sentences.english: I try to go to the gym three times a week.
sentences.korean: 일주일에 세 번 헬스장에 가려고 해요.

sentences.english: Mostly weight training and a bit of cardio.
I prefer outdoor exercise like jogging or cycling.
The gym feels too boring for me.
sentences.korean: 조깅이나 사이클링 같은 거요. 헬스장은 너무 지루해요.

sentences.english: To be honest, I don't really exercise.
I know I should, but I just can't find the motivation.
sentences.korean: 해야 하는 건 아는데 동기를 찾을 수가 없어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
